title: Islamabad Leads University
markdown:
- # Campus Director Message







I am indeed excited to invite you to step forward on a transforming journey at Lahore LEADS UNIVERSITY, ISLAMABAD CAMPUS where novelty meets tradition and ambition finds a jumping pad.



Our undergraduate programs are designed not just to educate but to provide hands on training facility. We offer a dynamic learning environment, highly qualified faculty and a vibrant campus life that help groom a holistic personality. Our curriculum blends academic rigor with real-world experience, preparing you to thrive in a competitive landscape. In addition to this, industry partnerships and a culture of excellence are our prominent features.



Admissions for Fall 2025 session are open now. Apply today and take the first step toward a future filled with opportunities.



We look forward to welcoming you to our campus situated in G-12 opposite to G-13 Metro Bus stop.



Warm regards,



**Professor Dr Munawar Iqbal Ahmed**





[Read More](https://leads.edu.pk/islamabad-campus/#)













![Campus Director Message](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Picture1.jpg)

- # Dean Faculty of Computing Sciences Message







It gives me immense pleasure to welcome you to Lahore Leads University, Islamabad Campus, Faculty of Computing Sciences — a hub of innovation, technology, and creativity.



Our mission is to equip students with cutting-edge knowledge and practical skills to thrive in the fast-changing digital world with a team of dedicated faculty, modern labs, and industry-aligned programs, we prepare future leaders who can turn ideas into impactful solutions.



Join us to explore, innovate, and shape the future through computing.





[Read More](https://leads.edu.pk/islamabad-campus/#)













![Dean Faculty of Computing Sciences Message](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/dr-jalil-ahmad.png)

[**A Vision for the Future**](https://leads.edu.pk/ielts/)

[**Why Leads**](https://leads.edu.pk/ielts/)

[Known for its innovative programs and cutting-edge research, Lahore Leads University has proven to be a winning choice for students seeking academic excellence. The allure of](https://leads.edu.pk/ielts/) [lucky nugget](https://gamblizard.ca/casinos/lucky-nugget-bonus/) casino bonuses and the excellence of Lahore Leads University education may seem like opposite worlds, but they have one thing in common: the opportunity to completely change your life for the better. Whether you’re looking for the thrill of winning at a casino or want to pursue academic excellence in computer science, business administration, or any other field, both paths offer opportunities to improve your financial situation. In both areas, the right choice and strategy can lead to success, proving that in education, as in gambling, the pursuit of excellence is a kind of jackpot.

### Academic Excellence

Academic Excellence is the essence of Lahore Leads University. To achieve our mission, we are continually introducing uniquqe academic programs and learning techniques.

### Distinctive Programs

The University is offering distinctive academic programs in a number of discplines by imparting latest pedagogical developments.

### Research & Development

The university has produced an extensive research output in various disciplines. The students not only publish articles in recognized journals, but also participates in national and international conferences.

### Learning Technology

The University offers smart classrooms, advanced labs, and digital resources to enhance learning and prepare students for the future.

### Qualified Faculty

We have a foreign and Native qualified faculty members who are expert in their specialized areas and have industrial exposure for grooming and mentoring of the students.

### Career counselling

Our proficient and professional staff and faculty members are available to guide and mentor you in selecting the best suitable programs for your personal and professional growth and development.

# IELTS Preparatory Course

Master all four modules of the IELTS exam: Listening, Reading, Writing, and Speaking. Through interactive lessons, rigorous mock tests, and personalized feedback

![](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/ielts2.avif)

✦✦✦

Limited Time Offer

### Early Bird Discount

Start your IELTS journey with LEADS and save on registration fees. Excellence awaits!

[Register Now & Save](https://leads.edu.pk/ielts/)

Achieve your study abroad or professional dreams with our intensive IELTS Preparatory Course. Designed for the Islamabad Campus, this program equips learners with essential skills to secure a Band 6.5–7.5+ in the IELTS Academic test.
